## 50/22 attempts and outcomes

Successes include accidental side-effects (territory kick from own half that lands in opposition 22) plus deliberate-intent fifty_22 attempts that succeeded. Failures are deliberate-intent only.

## Try channel (lateral position across the pitch where the try was scored)

Derived from the try beat's ballY: tight = central (≤8 from midline), wide = near a touchline (≥22), mid = between. Real-rugby reference ≈ tight 30% / mid 40% / wide 30%.

| channel | tries | share |
|---|---:|---:|
| tight | 225 | 15.5% |
| mid | 255 | 17.6% |
| wide | 967 | 66.8% |
